issue_title: Start an episode from a saved show identity
issue_body:
Add a creator-facing path from the show library to create a new episode using an existing show’s brand kit and saved template. When a creator selects a show, the new episode setup should prefill the show name, host/social context, brand colors/assets, and preferred layout/style so repeat episodes start from the show’s established identity instead of from generic defaults.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
A reviewer can open the app, choose a saved show from the show library, start a new episode, and see the setup, style preview, canvas/template choice, and export/review screens carrying that show’s brand kit and saved layout by default while still allowing edits. The flow must preserve the existing generic new-episode path. `node scripts/run-tests.mjs` must pass and include coverage for starting an episode from a saved show identity.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: The product already has setup, presets, canvas editing, audio polish, visual moments, templates, export, review, a show library, and brand kits. The most valuable next move is to connect those pieces into the repeat-production workflow the vision depends on: agencies and creators should be able to make the next episode for a show without rebuilding the show identity every time._
